mode: new background threads, one faction emblem per thread
current_image_policy: Current faction emblem references must point to stable unversioned PNGs in output_dir. Superseded images go to history_dir with _vNN filenames.

threads.thread_title: 断航故土 昭明帝国徽章 v01
threads.task: Generate one new standalone square emblem image for the approved Zhaoming sun-and-moon identity.

threads.thread_title: 断航故土 肃明国清明院徽章 v01
threads.task: Generate one new standalone square emblem image with a smaller outer insect motif and black overflow inside the white sun halo.

threads.thread_title: 断航故土 北境万兽徽章 v01
threads.task: Generate one new standalone square emblem image for the Wanshou banner/alliance mark, using many beast-clan signs rather than one mascot.

acceptance_checks: Three PNG files exist at the declared current or archived output paths.
Each PNG is one independent faction emblem image.
No generated image uses text, captions, or a multi-panel flag sheet layout.
Suming emblem has a small subordinate insect motif and black contamination bleeding into the white halo.
Northern alliance emblem reads as many beast tribes united, not a single-animal mascot.
Historical v03/v04 faction flag sheets are not used as source images.
